name: Chandan .
summary: As a passionate AI and Machine Learning Engineer, I specialize in transforming complex research concepts into tangible business value. My expertise covers the complete development of cutting-edge AI systems, with a deep focus on creating foundational Generative AI models (LLMs, Diffusion Models). I have a proven track record of operationalizing advanced techniques like Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to develop production-grade solutions. Leading high-impact initiatives.

experience.title: Data Scientist
experience.description: Developed high-accuracy document classification models and Agentic RAG systems, reducing manual processing and query response times. Automated ML pipelines with MLflow for improved scalability.

experience.title: AI Developer
experience.description: Built NLP pipelines using spaCy and Transformers for financial report analysis, implementing sentiment analysis and topic modeling with real-time metrics.

experience.title: Data Science Intern
experience.description: Developed an automated visualization dashboard for employee performance tracking using Streamlit and Matplotlib, enhancing efficiency by 17% and job satisfaction by 21%.
